svg.title: Platform-XP-Networking Composition Flowchart
svg.desc: Crossplane XRD composition pipeline for self-service VPC networking
svg.text: string · prefix for all resource names
public · load balancers · one per AZ
outputs: costCenter · ownerEmail · orgName · complianceScope · managedBy
creates ProviderConfig only (IRSA cross-account role chain)
generates all VPC resources via inline Go template · loops over azs[]
false → 1 EIP + 1 NAT GW per AZ (N route tables)
true → 1 EIP + 1 NAT GW total (1 shared route table)
public · k8s elb tag · LB facing
ingress: all (-1) from vpcCidr · egress: all to 0.0.0.0/0
egress: 443 to Nodes SG · 1025-65535 to Nodes SG (kubelet)
ingress: all (-1) from Nodes SG · egress: all to vpcCidr
ingress: HTTPS 443 from vpcCidr · egress: all
type: Gateway · added to all route tables
